# Architecture

## Overview
The project's domain focus is sustainable architecture for tropical climates.

## Focus Areas

### Tropical Climate Design
- High humidity considerations
- Heat management strategies
- Monsoon rainfall handling
- Natural ventilation

### Sustainable Materials
- Bamboo
- Wood
- Bio-concrete
- Mycelium composites

### Vernacular Wisdom
- Traditional building techniques
- Climate-responsive design
- Indigenous architecture knowledge

### AI + Architecture
- Generative design tools
- Machine learning optimization
- Parametric modeling
